user.title: Connect to PinPaw
user.description: Paste a PinPaw API token. Create one in the PinPaw app under Settings → API tokens.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure PinPaw
reconfigure.description: Update the server URL, API token or real-time setting. The token must belong to the same PinPaw account.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the PinPaw server.

abort.already_configured: This PinPaw account is already configured.
abort.account_mismatch: That token belongs to a different PinPaw account. Use a token for the same account, or add a new integration.
